name: Declarative Host API Demo
author: PermsTest
description: Self-contained declarative plugin that demonstrates safe PermsTest host APIs without shell or trusted code, including calculator, converter, text, JSON, URL, hash, Base64, and hex helpers.
comments: Uses calculator.evaluateInteger, converter.textToBytes, converter.bytesToText, text.*, json.*, url.*, hash.sha256, and encoding.base64*/encoding.hex* through the declarative runtime. All actions are explicit user taps and remain inside host-owned API mappings.

actions.title: Open API Demo UI
actions.description: Render ui.json and exercise safe host API mappings from a self-contained declarative plugin.
